flags.message: Cell is mode=forward, but the provisioned snapshot shows the appeal effectively concluded ('Opinion Issued' docketed 2024-09-24; last filing 2024-09-24), while this 2023-11-01 motion event is still resolved=false. The motion's actual ruling almost certainly exists on PACER/CourtListener but was not captured by outcome extraction — the docket has no explicit entry ruling on entry 18, though entry 23 is dual-captioned [23-12267, 23-13380], suggesting the appeals proceeded jointly. Treated as forward per context.json and deliberately avoided retrieving the ruling, but the forward-mode premise (outcome does not exist yet) does not hold here; consider re-provisioning as replay or backfilling outcome.json.
